name: Tamsin Reed
shortDescription: Junior White Cape, freshly licensed; far more comfortable with the books than the work.
description: Earned her cape the long way: years copying in the capital's Cape archives, then a junior librarian's post, then onto the licence track when an old archivist agreed to vouch for her. The cape is barely a year old and still sits on her shoulders like borrowed clothes; senior Capes call her Junior Reed, mostly without affection. She knows the spells out of the books cold, but most of what she knows about the field she also knows from books. She is overly polite to her seniors, asks too many questions, writes everything down, and has never been further from the capital than her training rotation. The Reach is her first proper posting — the first time anyone has trusted her to act on her own — and she is, by turns, painfully eager and quietly terrified about it.
